title: Tamil Nadu Assembly Poll 2026: NDA Inks Deal: E Palaniswami To Get 175-Odd Seats, BJP 27, PMK Share Down
description: The NDA has finalised the seat sharing deal for Tamil Nadu with AIADMK getting the lion's share -- 178 seats. Of the rest, 27 goes to the BJP, 18 to PMK and 11 to TTV Dhinakaran.
